name: Arni Tis Katsarolas Me Patates (Potted Lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lamb and wipe it dry. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Heat 4 tablespoons butter in a pot over medium heat. Add the lamb and brown on all sides.
3. Add lemon juice and bring to a boil. Stir occasionally.
4. Add 1 cup hot water (or more as needed) and simmer for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the meat is tender and only 1 cup liquid remains.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Slice the meat thinly against the grain.
6. Clean the tiny potatoes and cut them into small rounds using a melon baller if necessary.
7. In a frying pan, brown the potatoes in butter on all sides until crisp.
8. Add the potatoes to the pot containing the sauce from the meat.
9. Season with salt and pepper, then add 1/2 cup hot water.
10. Simmer until all liquid is absorbed and only the butter remains.
11. Before serving, carefully place thin slices of meat over the potatoes to heat through. Serve immediately.
